title: Loading Manager
description: Show more loading info on the loading screen
body:
**NOTE: This mod will not make for newer versions**

Ideas from Informed Load mod 

Because the author of Informed Load didn't make the 1.16+ ones, i make one myself :D.

Due to the vanilla progress bar don't show the details and i find that the progress it shows is not the real one.
This mod add 2 more loading progress bars and a memory bar. These bars will also show when reloading the resources.
